user.title: Connect your HDMI Matrix
user.description: Enter the network address of your Gofanco Prophecy 4x4 HDMI Matrix. The matrix must be reachable on the same network as Home Assistant.

data_description.host: The hostname or static IP of the matrix. The factory default is 192.168.1.92; a DHCP reservation is strongly recommended.
data_description.port: Defaults to 80. Only change this if the device is behind a port mapping.

reconfigure.title: Update HDMI Matrix connection
reconfigure.description: Update the network address used to reach your Gofanco Prophecy HDMI Matrix.

data_description.host: The hostname or static IP of the matrix.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the matrix at that address. Check the IP, that Home Assistant and the matrix are on the same network, and that no firewall is blocking port 80.
error.invalid_response: The device responded but the reply could not be parsed. Confirm the address points to a Gofanco Prophecy matrix and that its firmware is the web-control variant.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.already_configured: This HDMI Matrix is already configured.
abort.wrong_device: The new address points to a different device than the one configured.

save_preset.name: Save preset
save_preset.description: Save the matrix's current routing into one of the 8 preset slots.

entry_id.name: Configuration entry
entry_id.description: Which HDMI Matrix to target (only required when multiple matrices are configured).
